name: Dancer of the Boreal Valley
description:
HEIR OF FIRE FUCKED

Wandering around the High Wall of Lothric, you finally make your way into the cathedral, and the guardian from inside towers over you with aggressive intentions. But she also seems to have a pretty hot figure despite her deformed body. You think there is any chance she'll let you fight her in other ways?

Finally another souls boss, I've been wanting to make this tall woman for a long time. She'll be aggressive at first but I assure you, she loves dicks. (Character from Dark Souls III)

Update after censoring disaster: I'm not convinced about this art yet, I'll probably search for something else eventually

[Art from Goldcrustedchicken]

the darker the character, the better the pussy.
